subcodes.first_line: O Sovereign of the World, O Shelter of the Oppressed, O Upholder of Justice! We humbly present the supplications of the destitute in the court of Thy presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جهانبانا مظلوم پناها داد پرورا عدالت گسترا عرض بینوایان به پیشگاه حضور
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @justice and mercy, @petitions to authorities
